name: ServiceNow HR Service Delivery
tagline: AI-powered HR service management for enterprise case resolution
description: ServiceNow HR Service Delivery uses agentic AI to automate HR case management, employee requests, onboarding tasks, and cross-functional workflows. Its AI-powered virtual agent handles common employee inquiries, routes complex cases to the right specialists, and provides self-service knowledge bases. The platform excels at orchestrating processes across HR, IT, and facilities departments.
